positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene illustration, stylized with thick, contrasting black outlines on a creamy off-white background. The main subjects are stylized trees and foliage rendered as simple, abstract shapes and patterns (hexagons, triangles, smooth curves). Deep forest greens (emerald, jade) and muted sky blues dominate the color palette, contrasted sharply by the black outlines. Central composition, symmetrical arrangement, highly scalable for apparel printing. Artwork should have a sophisticated, mid-century modern poster aesthetic, embodying clean silhouettes, graphic quality, and high contrast. Vector art quality, detailed cross-hatching texture applied sparingly to some leaves for depth, ultra-clean lines, perfect for sublimation print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noise, gradient, realism, photorealism, messy lines, muddy colors, logos
